column1: # F2 EDIT — cursor moves with Left/Right/Home/End within the buffer.
# Buffer for a default-prefix label `hello` is `'hello` (6 bytes).
# Cursor starts at end (byte index 6) when EDIT begins.
# F2 loads the source form `'hello`; cursor at end.
# Left moves the cursor one byte at a time (ASCII).
# Home jumps to the start; End to the end.
# Esc cancels — buffer never committed; cell unchanged.
